body.title: Queue MCP server: refactor 7-branch _dispatch to handler dict
body.intention: I intend that queue MCP tool dispatch uses a handler dict so new tools register themselves rather than extending an if/elif chain.
body.description:
devices/queue/mcp_server.py _dispatch has 7 branches routing by tool name. Replace with _HANDLERS = {name: fn} dict.

**Affected files:** devices/queue/mcp_server.py
**Design rules:** OOP-first
**Scope boundary:** Replace if/elif in _dispatch only. No new tools. No behavior change.
**Completion criteria:** _dispatch uses dict lookup; all existing tests pass; adding a new tool requires one dict entry.
